scenarios.description: clone() on an empty Document produces a distinct deep copy with no child nodes (loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Document original = new Document("http://base"); // no children added
scenarios.expectedResult: clone != original; clone.childNodeSize() == 0; modifications to clone do not affect original

scenarios.description: clone() on Document with one child node produces deep copy with one child (loop-1)
scenarios.precondition: Document original = Document.createShell("http://base"); // has html, head, body (3 children), then remove all but one
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.childNodeSize() == 1; modifying clone's child does not affect original
pseudocode: TEST TC02 clone with one child

scenarios.description: clone() on Document with multiple nested children produces deep copy with full structure (loop-N)
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.childNodeSize() == original.childNodeSize(); clone.select("li").text() equals "item"; modifications to clone do not affect original
pseudocode: TEST TC03 clone with nested children

scenarios.description: clone() preserves independent OutputSettings: custom setting indentAmount (branch escapeMode unaffected)
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.outputSettings().indentAmount() == 5; modifying clone.indentAmount to 2 does not change original
pseudocode: TEST TC04 clone preserves outputSettings indent

scenarios.description: clone() preserves independent Parser: custom parser namespace applied
scenarios.precondition: Document original = new Document("http://base"); Parser p = Parser.xmlParser(); original.parser(p);
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.parser().getSettings() == p.getSettings(); modifying clone.parser() does not affect original.parser()
pseudocode: TEST TC05 clone preserves parser settings
